blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 391 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
